title: Sleep Anywhere (/trigger liedown)
description:
/trigger liedown

With a simple survival-command, you can lie down (sleep) anywhere!
body:
This datapack allows you to lie down anywhere, just like if you were sleeping.

Just run /trigger liedown while pointing at the place you want to lie on.
Survival friendly: if the sleeping player (mannequin) gets hit, the sleeping player will automatically get back to normal.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eec1e9d7836868baa5f34c589df332c5dc27d6d5.png)
